servinfo.title: Rear Brake Disc Removal and Installation

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage rear brake flexible hoses.
Never depress brake pedal during rear brake disc remove procedure shown below.

s1.ptxt: Hoist vehicle and remove rear wheel.
Remove rear brake caliper carrier bolts (1) and remove rear brake caliper carrier (2) from rear axle.
Push out rear brake disc (2) by tightening two M8 bolts (1) evenly into jack bolt holes.

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Rear Brake Disc Inspection:Disc Brake Model

attention2.ptxt: Do not twist rear brake flexible hose when installing rear brake caliper.

s1.ptxt: Install rear brake disc to rear wheel hub.
Install rear brake caliper carrier (1) to rear axle by tightening rear brake caliper carrier bolts to specified torque.

Depress brake pedal three times or more with engine running to activate rear brake pad clearance adjustment mechanism so that clearance between rear brake disc and rear brake pads will be appropriate.
Hoist vehicle and check that brake is free from dragging.
Perform brake test referring to “Load Test” of Precautions for Brake Service and make sure that brake system operates properly.
Install rear wheel and check that parking brake lever stroke is appropriate and parking brake produces proper braking force.
